title: Settings
aiCoachNote: Natural-language coaching worded by an AI from the engine's analysis. Falls back to built-in explanations when unavailable.

rating.label: Headline rating
rating.note: Glicko-2 always drives difficulty & pairings behind the scenes.

byok.title: AI Coach — your own key
byok.intro: Bring your own AI key to unlock richer coaching and the AI weekly recap. The key stays on this device (never sent to or stored on our server) and calls go straight to your chosen provider — <rates>billed to your key at your provider's rates</rates>. The coach keeps replies short, so typical costs are a fraction of a cent per explanation.
byok.keyWorksDirect: Key works — {{model}} responded directly from your browser.
byok.keyWorksRelay: Key works — {{model}} responded (relayed: your endpoint blocks browser calls, so requests go through the app server without being stored).
byok.activeNote: AI coaching is active with your key.
